ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, archived) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source or sponsor of the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project or research initiative */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment is conducted */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., Principal Investigator, Research Assistant) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office or lab location of the researcher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher started working at the company */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher left the company or ended their role */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the sample belongs to */,
  "control_mode" TEXT /* Control mode used for the sample */,
  "acquired" TEXT /* Date and time the sample was acquired */,
  "acquisition_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the acquisition method used */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the biological sample */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Specific treatment applied to the sample */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sample */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score or grade for the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_acquisition_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquisition_method_id") REFERENCES acquisition_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquisition_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acquisition method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the acquisition method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the acquisition method */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for the acquisition method */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the acquisition */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisition_methods_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., raw data, processed data, report) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., CSV, PDF, M4) */,
  "encryption_status" TEXT /* Encryption status of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum value for file integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the data belongs to */,
  "counts_above_threshold" INTEGER /* Counts above a specified threshold */,
  "coincidence_corrected" INTEGER /* Coincidence-corrected counts */,
  "from_value" REAL /* From value in the data */,
  "to_value" REAL /* To value in the data */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number of data points */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the data */,
  "median" REAL /* Median value of the data */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., instrument, manual entry) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality score or grade for the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the data type */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record the measurement belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_measurements_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sample_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_measurements_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  "version_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who created the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_version_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  "version_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who created the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_version_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office or lab location of the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started working at the company */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the company or ended their role */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., experiment, sample, file) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the action */,
  "action_device" TEXT /* Device used for the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "permission_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  "permission_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory standard */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the standard */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the standard */,
  "responsible_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person responsible for ensuring compliance */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Current compliance status (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "compliance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the compliance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_standards_responsible_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
